mapper.insert: insert into repair_record(stu_id, stu_name, building_id, room_id, type, detail, status, create_time, update_time) values (#{stuId}, #{stuName}, #{buildingId}, #{roomId}, #{type}, #{detail}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: select id, stu_id, stu_name, building_id, room_id, type, status, create_time, update_time from repair_record where stu_id = #{userId}
select id, stu_id, stu_name, building_id, room_id, type, status, create_time, update_time from repair_record where id = #{id}
select id, stu_id, stu_name, building_id, room_id, type, status, create_time, update_time from repair_record where id = #{id}
